title: R2: Update DESIGN.md to list U+FEFF in ZWS canonicalization
description: DESIGN.md § Display Name Canonicalization lists zero-width chars as 'U+200B, U+200C, U+2060 are removed without error.' However, the implementation (relay/src/ws.rs) also includes U+FEFF with a security justification: 'it is invisible and can appear in copy-pasted text.' This creates documentation/code divergence. Update DESIGN.md step 3 to include U+FEFF in the list of stripped characters, or explain the relationship to U+2060. Also clarify that the comment 'U+2060 is equivalent to U+FEFF without byte-order semantics' is about format category (both Cf), not functional equivalence.
close_reason: Already implemented: DESIGN.md §3 documents U+FEFF and bom_stripped_silently test exists in ws.rs
